title: 8m x 1.5m 50gsm Weed Control & Prevention Fabric Roll Lay Down Outdoor Garden
features: Weed guard control fabric. 8m x 1.5m roll 50gm. top weed growth in border paving path decking and under bark mulch.
description: Product Description Weed guard control fabric. 8m x 1.5m roll 50gm. top weed growth in border paving path decking and under bark mulch. Directions 1. Unroll the fabric and cut it to the desired size for the area where you want to prevent weed growth (e.g., under gravel, decking, paving, or mulch). 2. Lay the fabric on the ground, ensuring good coverage of the area. 3. Secure the fabric in place using staples, pins, or other suitable methods. 4. Place the desired material (gravel, decking, paving, mulch) on top of the fabric, covering it completely. Safety Warning May cause skin irritation or eye damage. Avoid contact with skin and eyes. Do not ingest or inhale. Use gloves and eye protection when handling. Dispose of responsibly to protect the environment. See more

specifications_table.Coverage: ‎8 meters in length and 1.5 meters in width
